ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger avsändaren som Mann Teknik AB i Mariestad, Sverige, men fakturan är utställd av Breas Medical AB i Mölnlycke, Sverige. Företagsnamnet Mann Teknik AB förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan, vilket innebär att avsändaren inte kan verifieras. Dessutom avser certifikatet kopplingar (couplings) medan fakturan avser medicinsk utrustning (respiratory medical equipment), varför varubeskrivningen inte stämmer överens.
overall_assessment.summary: Dokumentparet kan INTE godkännas. Certifikatets consignor (Mann Teknik AB) återfinns inte i fakturan (utställd av Breas Medical AB). Varubeskrivningen i certifikatet (couplings/hose units) matchar inte fakturans varor (medicinsk utrustning). Mottagaren i certifikatet (Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti, Indonesia) kan inte identifieras i fakturan (ZIMMO Trading Co, Saudi Arabia). Kvantiteterna och ursprungslandet kan inte meningsfullt verifieras givet att dokumentparet är inkonsistent.

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. Certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce (ICC). Original (1/1).

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. 5 pages. Issued by Breas Medical AB, Sweden.

lc_check.lc_validation_notes: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate.

consignor_search.search_notes: Searched all 5 pages of the invoice for 'Mann Teknik' (case-insensitive). The name does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The invoice is issued by 'Breas Medical AB' with address 'Företagsvägen 1, SE-435 33 Mölnlycke, SWEDEN'. The header/branding shows 'BREAS'. Customer is 'ZIMMO Trading Co'. Delivery address refers to 'Zimmo warehouse'. No reference to 'Mann Teknik' found in any header, footer, address block, VAT block, or any other text on any page.

criteria_failed: No invoice reference in certificate to match against invoice number
Consignor 'Mann Teknik AB' cannot be identified in the invoice (invoice issuer is 'Breas Medical AB')
Consignee 'Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti, Indonesia' cannot be identified in the invoice (customer is 'ZIMMO Trading Co, Saudi Arabia')
pairing_validation.validation_notes: NONE of the three pairing criteria are met. The certificate's consignor (Mann Teknik AB), consignee (Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti, Indonesia), and goods (couplings/hose units) have no connection to the invoice's issuer (Breas Medical AB), customer (ZIMMO Trading Co, Saudi Arabia), or goods (accessories for respiratory medical equipment). This is not a valid document pair.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Mann Teknik AB, Strandvägen 16, SE542 39, MARIESTAD, Sweden
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Breas Medical AB, Företagsvägen 1, SE-435 33 Mölnlycke, SWEDEN (issuer); BREAS (header branding)

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Mann Teknik' anywhere in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.details: Searched all 5 pages of the invoice. The text 'Mann Teknik' does not appear anywhere — not in headers, footers, address blocks, VAT blocks, branding, or any other location. The invoice is issued by 'Breas Medical AB' with branding 'BREAS'. No connection to 'Mann Teknik AB' can be identified.

Certificate: 'Mann Teknik AB'. Invoice issuer: 'Breas Medical AB'. These are entirely different company names with no common words in the identity-bearing part. 'Mann Teknik' vs 'Breas Medical' — different legal entities.

comparison_steps.description: Check if one name is a prefix of the other
comparison_steps.details: 'Mann Teknik' is not a prefix of 'Breas Medical' and vice versa.
No abbreviation relationship exists between 'Mann Teknik' and 'Breas Medical'.

comparison_steps.description: Check if names are commercial vs registered variants
comparison_steps.details: Different addresses (Strandvägen 16, Mariestad vs Företagsvägen 1, Mölnlycke). Different postal codes. Different cities. Cannot apply this rule.

comparison_steps.description: Check for omitted generic organization words
comparison_steps.details: The core names 'Mann Teknik' and 'Breas Medical' are entirely different. This is not a case of omitted organization words.

comparison_steps.description: Check for legal form abbreviation differences
comparison_steps.details: Both use 'AB'. The difference is in the company names themselves, not legal form.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate name is an exact subset of invoice name
comparison_steps.details: 'Mann Teknik' shares no words with 'Breas Medical'. Not a subset relationship.
Names differ by multiple words, not a single character.

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.3.9 - Consignor som fakturautställare utan explicit säljaradress
comparison_steps.description: Check if consignor name appears as invoice branding without explicit seller address
comparison_steps.details: 'Mann Teknik' does not appear in invoice branding. Invoice branding is 'BREAS'.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - search for consignor name anywhere in invoice
Juridisk part - direct company name comparison

evidence.raw_text: Mann Teknik AB, Strandvägen 16, SE542 39, MARIESTAD, Sweden
Breas Medical AB, Företagsvägen 1, SE-435 33 Mölnlycke, SWEDEN

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Mann Teknik AB' in Mariestad, Sweden. Invoice is issued by 'Breas Medical AB' in Mölnlycke, Sweden, with branding 'BREAS'. Thorough search of all 5 invoice pages found no occurrence of 'Mann Teknik' anywhere. The companies have entirely different names, different addresses, and different cities. While both are in Sweden, the company names share no common identity-bearing words. This is a clear MISMATCH per rule 4.1.3.1 — different legal entities.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Mann Teknik AB' kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan är utställd av 'Breas Medical AB'. Sökning i samtliga 5 sidor av fakturan (sidhuvuden, sidfötter, adressblock, VAT-block, kundblock, leveransadress) gav inget resultat för 'Mann Teknik'. Företagsnamnen delar inga identitetsbärande ord. Sekventiell prövning av 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.9 gav ingen tillämplig undantagsregel. MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Mann Teknik AB and Breas Medical AB could be related companies (group structure)
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.1.0 requires the consignor name to appear EXPRESSLY in the invoice. 'Mann Teknik' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. No assumption of group relationship is permitted per rules 4.1.3.1 and 4.1.0.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti, Jl. Agung Timur IV Blok 0-1, Kaveling 49, Sunter Jaya Tanjung, Priok Jakarta Utara 14350, Indonesia
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: ZIMMO Trading Co, Head Office, Building 31, Al-Qandeel Street, Al-Aziziah District, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia (customer); Zimmo warehouse - Khomrah District, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia (delivery)

comparison_steps.details: Invoice customer (primary field): 'ZIMMO Trading Co' in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia. Certificate consignee: 'Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti' in Jakarta, Indonesia. Completely different company names, different cities, different countries.
Delivery address: 'Zimmo warehouse - Khomrah District, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia'. This is also not 'Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti' and is in Saudi Arabia, not Indonesia.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate consignee appears in Ship-To field
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignee 'Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti' does not appear in any field of the invoice — not in Ship-To, not in customer, not anywhere.

evidence.raw_text: Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti, Jl. Agung Timur IV Blok 0-1, Kaveling 49, Sunter Jaya Tanjung, Priok Jakarta Utara 14350, Indonesia
ZIMMO Trading Co, Head Office, Building 31, Al-Qandeel Street, Al-Aziziah District, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
Zimmo warehouse - Khomrah District, Cross of King Faisal Road with AD-Dahiah street, 21441 Jeddah, Saudi Arabia

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti' in Jakarta, Indonesia. Invoice customer is 'ZIMMO Trading Co' in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia. Delivery address is 'Zimmo warehouse' in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia. The consignee name 'Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. Furthermore, the countries differ fundamentally: Indonesia vs Saudi Arabia. This is a clear MISMATCH.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti' i Jakarta, Indonesien, kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturans kund är 'ZIMMO Trading Co' i Jeddah, Saudiarabien. Leveransadressen avser 'Zimmo warehouse' i Jeddah, Saudiarabien. Företagsnamnet saknas helt i fakturan och länderna skiljer sig (Indonesien vs Saudiarabien). MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti could be a subsidiary or agent of ZIMMO Trading Co
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.2 prohibits assumptions about group relationships or agent relationships. The consignee name must be expressly identifiable in the invoice. It is not.

Break-Away; 2M11A4471 Hose unit 2" LPG 2" NPT SS FPM LT; 4M15B4471 Hose unit 3" LPG 3" NPT SS FPM LT; L415B4471 Tank unit 3" LPG 3" NPT SS FPM LT
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Accessories for Respiratory Medical Equipment (various items: VIVO 5x/6x PSU, Pneum block/PTU board, AC/DC switch kit, CPU boards, filters, blowers, humidifiers, interface modules, power supplies). Article numbers: 004702, 006774, 006783, 006916, 006917, 007105, 007251, 007808, 007264, 007270, 007271, 007277, 007275, 007279, 006490, 007202, 007203, 007598, 007632, 007642, 007643, 007644, 007627, 006994

comparison_steps.description: Compare article numbers from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate article numbers: 2MN11A4471, 4MN15B4471, 2M11A4471, 4M15B4471, L415B4471. Invoice article numbers: 004702, 006774, 006783, 006916, 006917, 007105, 007251, 007808, 007264, 007270, 007271, 007277, 007275, 007279, 006490, 007202, 007203, 007598, 007632, 007642, 007643, 007644, 007627, 006994. None of the certificate article numbers appear in the invoice. The numbering systems are entirely different (alphanumeric codes vs 6-digit numeric codes).

comparison_steps.step: Priority 2 - Text matching of goods description
comparison_steps.details: Certificate describes: 'couplings', 'Hose unit', 'Tank unit' — LPG equipment. Invoice describes: 'Accessories for Respiratory Medical Equipment' — medical ventilator components (CPU boards, filters, blowers, humidifiers). Entirely different product categories. No common identity-bearing terms.

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate describes LPG couplings and hose/tank units with specific alphanumeric article numbers (2MN11A4471 etc.). Invoice describes accessories for respiratory medical equipment — ventilator components. No article numbers match. No goods descriptions match. The products are from entirely different industries (LPG gas equipment vs medical ventilator equipment). Clear MISMATCH.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning avser kopplingar och slangenheter för LPG (artikel nr 2MN11A4471, 4MN15B4471 etc.). Fakturans varor avser tillbehör till medicinsk andningsutrustning (CPU-kort, filter, fläktar, befuktare med artikelnr 004702, 006774 etc.). Inga artikelnummer matchar. Inga varubeskrivningar har gemensamma identitetsbärande termer. Produkterna tillhör helt olika industrier. MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The goods could be related through a broad product category
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: LPG couplings/hose units and respiratory medical equipment accessories are entirely unrelated product categories. No semantic interpretation is permitted per rule 4.3.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: 10 pcs, 10 pcs, 20 pcs, 20 pcs, 7 pcs (for 5 specific articles)
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Various quantities for 24 different articles (2, 3, 1, 2, 1, 3, 3, 1, 1, 1, 2, 1, 1, 1, 2, 10, 5, 2, 2, 1, 1, 1, 4, 2 PC)

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate quantities can be identified in invoice for corresponding goods
comparison_steps.details: The certificate lists specific quantities for specific articles (e.g. 10 pcs of 2MN11A4471). None of these articles exist in the invoice. Quantities cannot be verified against the invoice because the goods themselves are entirely different. Even numerically, the certificate's per-article quantities (10, 10, 20, 20, 7) do not correspond to any matching article quantities in the invoice.

evidence.raw_text: Row 1: 2 PC, Row 2: 3 PC, Row 3: 1 PC, Row 4: 2 PC, ...

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate quantities (10, 10, 20, 20, 7 pcs) are tied to specific articles (2MN11A4471 etc.) that do not exist in the invoice. The invoice contains 24 different articles with quantities ranging from 1 to 10 PC. Since the goods are entirely different, no meaningful quantity verification can be performed. MISMATCH because the underlying articles cannot be matched.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets kvantiteter (10, 10, 20, 20, 7 st) avser specifika artiklar (2MN11A4471 etc.) som inte existerar i fakturan. Fakturan innehåller 24 andra artiklar med andra kvantiteter. Ingen meningsfull kvantitetsverifiering kan göras då varorna är helt olika. MISMATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice page 4 contains 'Country of Origin: Sweden' as an explicit origin statement.

Certificate origin: 'EU (Sweden)'. Invoice origin: 'Sweden'. Sweden is an EU member state. Per rule 4.5.4.2, if certificate states EU combined with a specific member state and invoice states that member state → verified. Per rule 4.5.4.2.1, when certificate states 'EU [land]' and invoice confirms EU origin via the specific country → MATCH.

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate origin is 'EU (Sweden)'. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin: Sweden' on page 4. Sweden is an EU member state. Per rule 4.5.4.2, EU combined with Sweden ↔ Sweden is a verified match. No contradicting origins in the invoice. Note: While the origin technically matches, this is in the context of a fundamentally mismatched document pair.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland 'EU (Sweden)'. Fakturan anger 'Country of Origin: Sweden' (sida 4). Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. Enligt regel 4.5.4.2 är 'EU (Sweden)' ekvivalent med 'Sweden'. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate
Document A identified as certificate (Certificate of Origin, ICC), Document B identified as invoice (Commercial Invoice, Breas Medical AB). Single certificate file, single invoice file.

FAILED - None of the three pairing criteria are met: (1) No invoice reference in certificate to match, (2) Consignor 'Mann Teknik AB' not found in invoice, (3) Consignee 'Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti' not found in invoice. Document pair is invalid. Per rule 8.6, result is NOT_IDENTICAL.

MATCH - EU (Sweden) ↔ Country of Origin: Sweden

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Consignor: Mann Teknik AB; Consignee: Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti; Ingen fakturareferens
sections.invoice_value: Utställare: Breas Medical AB; Kund: ZIMMO Trading Co; Fakturanr: 263158
sections.rule_applied: Parningsvalidering – minst ett av tre kriterier ska vara uppfyllt
sections.motivation: Inget giltigt dokumentpar kunde identifieras. Certifikatets consignor (Mann Teknik AB), consignee (Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti) och avsaknad av fakturareferens innebär att inget av de tre parningskriterierna är uppfyllt mot fakturan (utställd av Breas Medical AB till ZIMMO Trading Co).

sections.certificate_value: Mann Teknik AB, Strandvägen 16, SE542 39, MARIESTAD, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Breas Medical AB, Företagsvägen 1, SE-435 33 Mölnlycke, SWEDEN
sections.rule_applied: Sekventiell prövning 4.1.0–4.1.3.9: Consignor-namn kan inte identifieras i fakturan
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Mann Teknik AB' kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan är utställd av 'Breas Medical AB'. Sökning på samtliga 5 sidor gav inget resultat. Företagsnamnen saknar gemensamma identitetsbärande ord. Samtliga undantagsregler (4.1.3.1–4.1.3.9) har prövats utan tillämpbarhet.

sections.certificate_value: Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti, Jakarta, Indonesia
sections.invoice_value: ZIMMO Trading Co, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
sections.rule_applied: Consignee kan inte identifieras i fakturan – annat företag, annat land
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti' i Indonesien kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturans kund är 'ZIMMO Trading Co' i Saudiarabien. Leveransadressen avser också Saudiarabien. Helt olika företag och länder.

sections.certificate_value: Two pallets of couplings: 2MN11A4471 Hose unit, 4MN15B4471 Hose unit, 2M11A4471 Hose unit, 4M15B4471 Hose unit, L415B4471 Tank unit
sections.invoice_value: Accessories for Respiratory Medical Equipment: VIVO PSU, Pneum block, AC/DC switch kit, CPU boards, filters, blowers, humidifiers etc.
sections.rule_applied: Artikelnummer matchar inte (Prioritet 1); varubeskrivningar avser helt olika produktkategorier (Prioritet 2)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets artikelnummer (2MN11A4471 etc.) återfinns inte i fakturan. Certifikatet avser LPG-kopplingar och slangenheter. Fakturan avser tillbehör till medicinsk andningsutrustning. Helt olika produktkategorier utan gemensamma identitetsbärande termer.

sections.invoice_value: 24 artikelrader med kvantiteter 1–10 PC (ej matchande artiklar)
sections.rule_applied: Kvantiteter kan inte verifieras då underliggande artiklar inte matchar
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantiteter avser artiklar som inte existerar i fakturan. Ingen meningsfull kvantitetsverifiering kan genomföras.
Certifikatet anger 'EU (Sweden)'. Fakturan anger 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. Enligt EU-normaliseringsregeln är detta ekvivalent. MATCH.

human_readable_report.conclusion: Dokumentparet kan INTE godkännas. Fyra av fem kontrollpunkter ger MISMATCH: avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning och kvantitet. Certifikatet avser en helt annan avsändare (Mann Teknik AB), mottagare (Pt Usaha Jayamas Bhakti, Indonesien) och varor (LPG-kopplingar) jämfört med fakturan (utställd av Breas Medical AB till ZIMMO Trading Co i Saudiarabien, avseende medicinsk utrustning). Enbart ursprungsland (Sverige) matchar. Parningsvalideringen (regel 8.6) bekräftar att detta inte är ett giltigt dokumentpar.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: 4 checkpoints have MISMATCH status (4.1, 4.2, 4.3, 4.4). comparison_result is NOT_IDENTICAL. This is consistent. 1 checkpoint has MATCH (4.5). No contradictions between motivations and statuses detected.
